name: Golden Triangle Tour with Khajuraho & Varanasi
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Khajuraho, Varanasi with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representatives assisted you, and a guided tour
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representatives assisted you, and a guided tour to visit Qutub minar, Lotus temple, India gate President house, & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Jaipur (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Jaipur (260 Kms. approx. 6 Hrs.): After breakfast, proceed to Jaipur. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing; Today after breakfast, a guided to the ancient capital of Am
itinerary.description: Jaipur Sightseeing; Today after breakfast, a guided to the ancient capital of Amber, visiting beautiful Amber Fort, Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar), Rajasthani handicraft. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Agra (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Jaipur to Agra (260 Kms. approx. 6 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast, proceed to Agra, check in at the hotel, after refreshing a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Agra to Khajuraho (400 KM
itinerary.description: Agra to Khajuraho (400 KM. Approx. 6-7 Hrs. Approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Khajuraho, En-Route visit Orchha & drive to Khajuraho & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast proceed to visit Western temple, Jain temple & overnight stay at
itinerary.description: After breakfast proceed to visit Western temple, Jain temple & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho to Varanasi (390 Kms
itinerary.description: Khajuraho to Varanasi (390 Kms. 7/8 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast, proceed to Varanasi & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today early morning boat ride on the holy river Ganges to see the famous bathing
itinerary.description:
Today early morning boat ride on the holy river Ganges to see the famous bathing Ghats site.(River boating - direct payment basis) and back to hotel,  After breakfast, proceed to visit Vishwanath temple, Sankat mochan temple, BHEU &  drop you at Varanasi Airport/Railway station for your onward journey.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Meals
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour It
